description_long: This is a vintage-style pocket watch with a round, ornate metal case and a decorative winding crown at the top. The front face features a white dial with black Roman numerals, minute markers, and two slender clock hands, all protected by a glass cover. The case is adorned with intricate floral engravings, giving it an antique and elegant appearance. The back of the watch is fully covered and also displays elaborate embossed patterns, suggesting a high level of craftsmanship. The metal surface has a slightly tarnished, aged finish, adding to its historical character. This object is compact and designed to be portable, likely fitting comfortably in the palm of a hand.
description: A vintage pocket watch with an ornate metal case, Roman numerals, and decorative engravings. The design is compact, elegant, and portable.
description_view_0: The front of the pocket watch shows the white dial with black Roman numerals and visible clock hands, along with the ornate metal case and winding crown.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the clock face and the decorative metalwork on the case, with the winding crown clearly visible at the top.
description_view_2: The back of the watch is visible, displaying intricate embossed floral patterns on the metal case, with no clock face in view.
description_view_3: A rear-side view focusing on the detailed engravings on the back of the case, with the winding crown at the top.
attribute_face_design: Round white face with black Roman numerals, minute markers, and ornate clock hands, encased in a glass cover.
